hooks.command: $d=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd()|ConvertFrom-Json;$p=[string]$d.tool_input.file_path;$p=$p.Replace('\','/');if($p -match '(^|/)src/.*\.tsx?$'){@{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PreToolUse';permissionDecision='deny';permissionDecisionReason='Built-in Edit is blocked on src/ .ts/.tsx files (Serena enforcement). Use Serena replace_content / replace_symbol_body / insert_before_symbol / insert_after_symbol instead.'}}|ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 5}

$d=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd()|ConvertFrom-Json;$p=[string]$d.tool_input.file_path;$p=$p.Replace('\','/');if($p -match '(^|/)src/.*\.tsx?$'){@{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PreToolUse';permissionDecision='deny';permissionDecisionReason='Built-in Read is blocked on src/ .ts/.tsx files (Serena enforcement). Use Serena get_symbols_overview then find_symbol (include_body) for discovery; Grep and Glob are allowed for locating. Read is only appropriate for a few lines after you already have a symbol overview.'}}|ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 5}
